visual_description: The video opens with a low-angle shot of several people in dark pants and shoes walking on a concrete surface. The camera then focuses on a person in a black jacket lying face down on the ground, with a pool of dark liquid spreading from their side. A man in a dark suit and white shirt appears, holding a handgun and looking off-screen with a tense expression.
audio_description: A dramatic, suspenseful musical score plays throughout the clip, featuring a prominent string section that creates a tense and urgent atmosphere.
